allow: Bash(powershell -Command "\(Get-Content optimizer.html\) -replace 'styles.css\\?v=20260505-07', 'styles.css?v=20260528-01' | Set-Content optimizer.html -Encoding utf8; \(Get-Content optimizer-minimum.html\) -replace 'styles.css\\?v=20260505-07', 'styles.css?v=20260528-01' | Set-Content optimizer-minimum.html -Encoding utf8; \(Get-Content optimizer-minimum.html\) -replace 'optimizer.js\\?v=20260520-01', 'optimizer.js?v=20260528-01' | Set-Content optimizer-minimum.html -Encoding utf8; \(Get-Content optimizer.html\) -replace 'optimizer.js\\?v=20260520-01', 'optimizer.js?v=20260528-01' | Set-Content optimizer.html -Encoding utf8")
PowerShell(node --check firebase-client.js; node --check archive.js; node --check tools/backfill-tested-flags.mjs)

PowerShell(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const files=['test-sonuclari.html','optimizer.html','optimizer-v2.html','optimizer-minimum.html','regression-report.html','saved.html','quick.html','index.html','fav.html','wrong.html','archive.html'];for\(const f of files\){const b=fs.readFileSync\(f,'utf8'\);const n=b.replace\(/firebase-client\\.js\\?v=[0-9-]+/g,'firebase-client.js?v=20260610-1'\);fs.writeFileSync\(f,n,'utf8'\);} const a=fs.readFileSync\('archive.html','utf8'\);fs.writeFileSync\('archive.html',a.replace\(/archive\\.js\\?v=[0-9-]+/,'archive.js?v=20260610-1'\),'utf8'\);console.log\('ok'\);")

PowerShell(node --check firebase-client.js; node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const files=['test-sonuclari.html','optimizer.html','optimizer-v2.html','optimizer-minimum.html','regression-report.html','saved.html','quick.html','index.html','fav.html','wrong.html','archive.html'];for\(const f of files\){const b=fs.readFileSync\(f,'utf8'\);fs.writeFileSync\(f,b.replace\(/firebase-client\\.js\\?v=[0-9-]+/g,'firebase-client.js?v=20260610-2'\),'utf8'\);}console.log\('ok'\);")
